flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Indian Hills Community College fell 27% between 2006 and 2009 (52.1% → 38.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Indian Hills Community College fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8k → 1.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Indian Hills Community College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.6k → $5.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Indian Hills Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0% → 0.0%).
